summary: Complete implementation of post-write invalidation guard. All 22 steps + 2 prerequisites done. 28 new tests in test_invalidation_guard.py, all passing (71 total with existing tests). Files created: invalidation_guard.py (detect_spurious_invalidations + InvalidationGuard). Files modified: graphiti_client.py (restore_edge_validity, bulk_restore_edge_validity, guard integration in add_episode), config/schema.py (invalidation_guard_enabled field), tests/conftest.py (MockNode.uuid field).
